name: wp-rig/philosophy-tabs
title: Philosophy Tabs
description: Tabbed content section with a full-width image swap, wipe animation, and heading/body per tab. Up to 5 tabs.

default.label: ANTI-INFLAMMATORY BALANCE
default.heading: Anti-Inflammatory Balance
default.body: Chronic inflammation is increasingly recognised as a key biological process associated with ageing. Eternal formulations prioritise carefully selected ingredients traditionally linked with supporting balanced inflammatory responses and long-term cellular health.
